active_verify.note: The required active c2 verify first flaked to 120, then an immediate rerun returned the expected [137,137].

change.description: Test rowchunk3 on the compact original-c8 rows4..7 fixture and compare against rowchunk2.

findings: Compact original c8 rows4..7 remain red under rowchunk3 native-paged full-attention: prefixes [45,11,137,137]. The first 3-row group is enough to reproduce rows0/1 failures while the single-row tail is green.

Adding the dense-context/batch-gate diagnostic to rowchunk3 is still red at [45,11,83,137], so dense context does not repair the leading 3-row tail group and worsens the third row relative to native paged rowchunk3.

The same compact fixture remains green under rowchunk2 native-paged control at [137]*4. Therefore this tail quartet needs row groups of at most two; rowchunk3 is not a safe cap for the residual c8 rows.

guard.command: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json

prompt_verifier.evidence: Materially advances focused full-attention evidence: rowchunk3 is red for compact c8-tail rows while rowchunk2 is generated-token green [137]*4, proving the safe cap for this tail quartet is <=2 rows. No throughput claim.

blockers: full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path
full-attention O projection forced to batch GEMV for multi-row chunks
